items.title: Pool Closed
items.subtitle: The pool is closed to public access. There may be swim lessons or clubs using the pool at this time.

items.title: Family Fun Swimming
items.subtitle: Make a splash with all the family in these 55-minute open-water sessions. With floats, sinkers and toys available it’s great fun for children and grown-ups alike. Adults are not permitted to attend Family Fun Swims unless they are accompanying a child.

items.title: Pool Closed
items.subtitle: The pool is closed to public access. There may be swim lessons or clubs using the pool at this time.

items.title: Casual Swimming with Lanes at RCP 25m (2m Deep)
items.subtitle: 25m public swim sessions with lanes at the Royal Commonwealth Pool with a depth of 2m. Open to everyone, our public swim sessions let you enjoy the water your way. Lanes will be made available. No need to book—just drop in and enjoy the pool!

items.title: Casual Swimming with Lanes at RCP 25m (1.25m Deep)
items.subtitle: 25m Public Swimming sessions with lanes at the Royal Commonwealth Pool with a depth of 1.25m. Open to everyone, our public swim sessions let you enjoy the water your way. Lanes will be made available. No need to book—just drop in and enjoy the pool!

items.title: Aquafit
items.subtitle: Enjoy a low-impact, full-body workout at Aquafit as part of our aquatic fitness classes.

items.title: Pool Fitness Classes
items.subtitle:
Our pool fitness classes offer an opportunity to get active and improve your fitness, whilst reducing impact.

These classes are all included with a Full Fitness or Fitness Class membership.

items.title: Relaxed Swim
items.subtitle: Adult only relaxed swim sessions, suited to less confident swimmers to build confidence at their own pace. Pool set ups may vary depending on the venue. Please note that price at Royal Commonwealth Pool is £8.50.

items.title: Buddy Swimming
items.subtitle: Safe, welcoming swim sessions for older adults.

items.title: Lane Swimming
items.subtitle:
Enjoy lane swimming sessions across Edinburgh. Our pools split into different lanes at the lifeguard's discretion offering spaces for all abilities and pace.

You must be able to swim full lengths for these sessions. 

No requirement to book - just drop in.
